gate_status: pass: kgpt-30m trained locally from random initialization to the configured 40-step PHASE-05A completion point.
phase_gate: The North Star 30M+ requirement is satisfied for local educational scale-gate evidence. The run is not a quality claim because the corpus is intentionally tiny.

tokenizer_decision.rationale: Use the repo-owned byte-level BPE tokenizer because it has completed provenance, byte fallback, English/Japanese roundtrip behavior, and successful PHASE-04A tiny-pretraining evidence.

data_mixture.ratio_summary: Approximately 39% English, 36% Japanese, and 25% mixed Japanese/English by record count.
data_mixture.license: Repo-authored fixture for this project; no third-party text source.

profiling.method: Final metrics.jsonl row from local CPU kgpt-30m smoke run.
profiling.peak_memory: not available from CPU metrics helper

stretch_decisions: kgpt-50m dry-run passed with 59,345,280 parameters; actual training deferred until the 30M run is reviewed.
kgpt-100m dry-run passed with 113,721,600 parameters; actual training deferred until 50M evidence and a longer run budget exist.
bottlenecks: The corpus is too small for meaningful language quality claims.
CPU throughput is sufficient for smoke evidence but not long 30M+ pretraining.
Japanese byte-level segmentation remains inefficient under the provisional tokenizer.
Memory profiling on CPU lacks peak memory; MPS/MLX profiling is deferred to later inference and optimization phases.
